task.label: Notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

conditions.condition: In the case of a personal data breach

exception.description: The personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

conditions.condition: Where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours
After becoming aware of a personal data breach
Where, and in so far as, it is not possible to provide the information at the same time

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: When the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

exception.description: The controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures applied to the affected data
The controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk is no longer likely to materialise

task.label: Make a public communication or similar measure

conditions.condition: If communicating the personal data breach to the data subject would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Require the controller to communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: If the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
Having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: If required by the supervisory authority

task.label: Decide that any of the conditions referred to in paragraph 3 are met

conditions.condition: If the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
Having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk
